fallback.reason: No callable local cangjie skill was available; only cangjie references were found inside the local book2skill package documentation.

metadataSupplemented.reason: The local source was a short DSMweb supplement and did not include complete book-style metadata.
items: Treated the entry as a DSM theory/method entry rather than a single book.
Supplemented foundational origin: Donald V. Steward, 1981 IEEE Transactions on Engineering Management article on Design Structure System.
Supplemented modern methods reference: Steven D. Eppinger and Tyson R. Browning, Design Structure Matrix Methods and Applications, MIT Press, 2012.

runtimeDependencyPolicy: Closed skill: execute from SKILL.md; use references/source-notes.md only as local optional provenance; do not require external source folders, webpages, original books, source reports, machine-local paths, or cross-skill files.

closureReview.remainingRisk: DSM can be mistaken for prioritization; SKILL.md now gates against priority/value scoring and requires dependency convention.

finalCheck.notes: Test prompt counts expanded to meet suite-wide closure thresholds; runtime remains self-contained.

qualityChecks: SKILL.md states self-contained runtime contract and does not require original sources.
External source paths are preserved only in sourceFiles for audit trace.
test-prompts.json includes should_trigger, should_not_trigger, edge_cases, and compliance_expectations.
